description: Two projects have different values for the same concept. A query scoped to project-A must return project-A's answer, not project-B's.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: In project-alpha we deploy to the us-east-1 AWS region.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: Our CI pipeline runs tests on every pull request.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: In project-delta we deploy to the eu-west-1 AWS region.

seed_turns.speaker: user
seed_turns.content: Project delta uses a weekly deployment schedule.

query: which AWS region do we deploy to
